EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed user name {object.value} to {object.new_value} in ViPNet Policy Manager on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the permissions for user {object.account.name} in ViPNet Policy Manager on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the password for user {object.account.name} in ViPNet Policy Manager on host {event_src.host}
